description: Composition Grey crew neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape lining on the inside of the neck and print on the chest with dense felt detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Take the cue of being stylish from lee and make your own path for others to follow, in your college or elsewhere. Stand out in the crowd in this melange grey t-shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with slim Fit blue denims and funky canvas shoes for a casual look. *This product is developed using the unique multiple hand processes method. Slight peeling of the print post home laundry is absolutely normal, giving it a vintage look, and hence, should not be considered as a defect. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
